_comment: Example learner workspace settings for claude-teacher. Copy this into a real learner project's .claude/settings.json to enable progress logging, submission auto-tracking, and guardrails against accidentally editing teacher-owned course content.

hooks.command: bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; case "$f" in .claude-teacher/submissions/*) mkdir -p .claude-teacher/logs; date -u +%FT%TZ | xargs -I{} echo "{} submission-touched $f" >> .claude-teacher/logs/submissions.log ;; esac'

bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; case "$f" in runtime/courses/*) echo "BLOCKED: runtime/courses is teacher-owned. Edit the authoring DSL and recompile instead." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0'
